message:
test(mux-pool): add health_check recovery and no-retry tests

Add pool_health_check_recovers_from_unexpected_response verifying that
with recovery enabled, a health check recovers after receiving an
unexpected list-panes response (reconnects once, stats show 1 recovery).
Add pool_health_check_without_recovery_does_not_retry verifying that
with recovery disabled, the health check fails immediately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
